# iproute_maddress (Resource)

Manages a multicast address (ip maddress).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Multicast address
resource "iproute_maddress" "example" {
  device  = "eth0"
  address = "33:33:00:00:00:01"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `address` (String) Multicast address.
- `device` (String) Interface name.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
